NEVER
Epsom
Calcium nitrate
Miracle‑Gro
Yeast

ingredients.name: Eggshell Powder, only given once after planting, scratched in
Bone Meal - Only if needed - leaves are purple due to calcium deficiency

recipes.name: Peppers - in hole mix for transplanting
directions: Mix Perlite into backfill.
notes:
DO NOT USE IN THE HOLE FOR PEPPERS:
Epsom salt → peppers are magnesium‑sensitive
Calcium nitrate → burns young roots
Miracle‑Gro → too “hot” in Texas heat
Yeast/molasses/fish → attracts ants & pests underground
Vermiculite → holds too much moisture

recipes.name: Beef Stroganoff
directions: Place a large deep pan or dutch oven over medium-high heat. Add 2 Tbsp oil and once oil is very hot, add thinly sliced beef strips in a single layer, cooking 1 minute per side without stirring. Cook until just browned and no longer red. Sear beef in 2 batches so you don't overcrowd the pan. Remove beef to a plate and cover to keep warm.
Add 2 Tbsp butter, chopped onion and sliced mushrooms. Sautee 6-8 minutes or until liquid has evaporated and onions and mushrooms are soft and lightly browned.
Add 1 minced garlic clove and sautee 1 minute until fragrant. Add 1 Tbsp flour and sautee another minute stirring constantly.
Pour in 1 cups beef broth, scraping any bits from the bottom of the pan then add 3/4 cup whipping cream and simmer another 1 to 2 minutes or until slightly thickened.
Stir a few Tablespoons of the sauce into 1/4 cup of sour cream to temper it so the sour cream doesn’t curdle then add it to the pan while stirring constantly.

Stir in 1 Tbsp Worcestershire, 1/2 tsp dijon mustard, and season with 1/2 tsp salt and 1/4 tsp pepper, or season to taste and continue simmering until sauce is creamy. Add beef with any accumulated juices back to the pan and bring just to a simmer or until beef is heated through.
notes: For best results, be sure your meat is either: Top Sirloin, Boneless Ribeye steak, Beef Tenderloin (Filet Mignon), or Filet Mignon tips. Thinly slice against the grain to ensure tender bites of beef.

notes:

recipes.name: Cucumber - Regular Feeding every 7 - 10 days

ingredients.name: Epsom Salt - - used only if deficiency noticed

notes:
• Bone meal once at week 2–3 scratched into the ground.
• Epsom salt only if deficiency
Epsom salt
Use only if you see:
Yellowing between veins
Pale new growth
Apply no more than once every 3–4 weeks

NEVER USE ON CUCUMBERS:
Calcium nitrate, Miracle‑Gro, yeast, rooting powder

recipes.name: Armadillo Eggs
directions: 1. With a knife, cut out a long and narrow slit from the top of each pepper to remove the seeds. Keep the stems attached.
2. Roast the peppers over a burner until they just begin to blister and soften.
3. Ina mixing bowl, combine the cream cheese, shredded cheese, roasted garlic and onion powder. Stuff the peppers with cheese mixture.
4. Cut the sausage into 12 equal slices. Take one slice and roll out thinly between two pieces of waxed paper.
5. Place a pepper in the center of sausage round and form around the pepper, leaving the stem out. Repeat with the remaining peppers and sausage.
6. Place the eggs in a bowl and roll the wrapped peppers in the egg wash then coat generously with the potato flakes. Repeat in the egg wash and potato flakes for a double coating.

7. Add 2 to 3 inches of fry oil to a deep fryer or Dutch oven and heat to 350 degrees Fry the peppers for about 4 minutes, turning occasionally, until a deep golden brown and crispy. Remove and let cool slightly on a paper towel or wire rack. Serve warm.

recipes.name: Potato Salad
directions: Boil and Chop Potatoes: Place the whole, unpeeled potatoes in a large pot of water. Bring the water to a boil, then lower the heat and simmer for 10 to 15 minutes, until the potatoes are fork tender. Drain the water completely from the pot and then cover the pot with a lid to allow the potatoes to steam for 5-10 minutes. Peel potatoes, if desired, and cut them into ½ inch chunks.

Make Dressing: Separate egg yolks from the whites of the hard boiled eggs and place the yolks in a bowl. Mash the yolks with a fork and then stir in the mayonnaise, buttermilk, mustard, a splash of pickle juice, and salt and pepper, to taste.

Assemble: Pour the dressing over the warm potatoes. Chop the egg whites and add them to the potatoes along with the celery, onion, and pickles. Stir well, cover, and refrigerate for a few hours to allow the flavors to blend.
notes: Make Ahead Instructions: potato salad can be made 1-2 days ahead of time. It tastes best if refrigerated for at least a few hours before serving. Store leftover potato salad in the fridge for up to 5 days.

recipes.name: Eggplant dry mix
directions: make trench around plant 6 to 8 inches away from the stem. 1 to 2 inches deep

directions: Install Stacked blade in the 72 oz pitcher
Place all ingredients in the pitcher in the order listed, and install the lid

when blending is complete, open the pour spout, pour into cups and serve

recipes.name: Salsa
directions: Install stacked blad into 72oz pitcher
Place ingredients in pitcher as listed, install the lid
Select mode, MINCE, then press Start/Stop. When complete, MINCE one more time
Remove lid and stacked blade, pour into large bowl.
notes: Using jalapeño seeds adds the heat!

recipes.name: Tacos
directions: Mix spices, herbs, salt, and corn starch in a small bowl until well blended. Set seasoning blend aside.
Brown meat in a large skillet on medium-high heat. Drain fat.
Stir in seasoning blend and water.
Bring to a boil. Reduce heat and simmer for 5 minutes or until slightly thickened, stirring occasionally.
Spoon into warm taco shells. Serve with desired toppings, such as shredded lettuce, chopped tomatoes, shredded cheese, salsa, and sour cream.
notes: For a little heat, try adding 1/4 teaspoon McCormick® Crushed Red Pepper to your seasoning blend.
To make a big batch of homemade taco seasoning to have on hand, simply double, triple, or even quadruple the seasoning blend part of the recipe.
Store in an airtight container in a cool, dry place for up to 6 months.
To prepare 1 pound of taco meat, use about 4 1/2 tablespoons of the seasoning blend along with 3/4 cup water.
